data.description: Enforce that lease binding is created or changed only during claim flow. For any non-claim command, if a caller provides `lease_id` and the knot does not already have that exact lease bound, the command must fail instead of creating, switching, or applying a lease binding. Specifically, `new --lease` and `update --lease` must never bind a lease outside claim context. If a knot is claimed without a lease, no later non-claim command (including `update`, `next`, etc.) may set or replace a lease until a future claim operation does so.
